qa_pair.question: How many maestro tasks belong to the mission with id `msn-billing`? Answer with a single integer.
Within the mission `msn-launch`, exactly one task has status `completed`. What is its title? Provide the title verbatim.
qa_pair.answer: Wire feature flag for v2 endpoint

qa_pair.question: Across all tasks in the project, exactly one task carries both the label `security` and the label `payments`. What is its slug? Provide the slug verbatim (the full `verb/kebab-tail` form).
Inspect the contract for task `tsk-aa0001`. How many distinct versions of the contract exist? Answer with a single integer.
What `riskClass` is recorded on the current contract for task `tsk-aa0001`? Answer one of: low, medium, high, critical.
For task `tsk-aa0001`, how many evidence rows have witness level `witnessed-by-ci`? Answer with a single integer.
For task `tsk-cc0001`, how many evidence rows have kind `command`? Answer with a single integer.
What decision is recorded on the most recent verdict for task `tsk-bb0001`? Answer one of: PASS, FAIL, HUMAN, BLOCK.
Task `tsk-cc0002` has exactly one evidence row of kind `threat-model`. What `residualRisk` value is recorded in that row's payload? Answer one of: low, medium, high.
How many maestro tasks across the entire project have status `completed`? Answer with a single integer.
